---
title: Vitrines
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808683/Template_11_vrocbh.png
description: vitrines du Bon Marché
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2025-12-27
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808683/Template_11_vrocbh.png)
